tribe_description: A tribe of practical performance seekers who look for products that deliver on what they care about most. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, real-world performance.
tribe_definition: A tribe of practical performance seekers who look for products that deliver on what they care about most. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, real-world performance.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Quick to balance praise with constructive critique

main.text: Verifying products work exactly as advertised
Avoiding wasted time, money, or frustration
Maximizing comfort, fit, and ergonomic ease
Ensuring long-term durability under real use
Helping a like-minded community make informed choices

validation_triggers: Feature sets that enhance everyday convenience
Responsive customer support or clear instructions
friction_points: Misleading size charts or tight fits
Intrusive ads, excessive noise, or usability hurdles

implicit_goals.text: Select dependable, high-performing products that integrate smoothly into daily life
Equip similar users with actionable, expectation-setting insights
Influence brands to improve reliability, sizing accuracy, and long-term quality

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented enthusiast who evaluates products through hands-on experience, focusing on functional performance, design nuances, and small usability quirks. They write balanced, descriptive reviews to share practical insights and help others gauge real-world quality and enjoyment before purchasing. Their motivation is to provide fellow consumers with clear, experience-based guidance rather than broad praise or criticism.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an experienced gamer who closely analyzes gameplay mechanics, comparing new installments to earlier entries and spotlighting specific features like combat options, controls, and save behavior. Their reviews balance personal enjoyment with practical critiques, aiming to guide fellow players on how the game feels in-depth and where it diverges from expectations. They are motivated by a desire to evaluate mechanical depth and share insights that help others decide whether the game will satisfy similar preferences.

user_history_reviews.review_text: I don't generally like big watches, but there's something about this one that really grabs my attention.  It came well packaged in a nice gift box.  The face of the watch is big, but it's also surprisingly thick.  It arrived in immaculate condition.  The watch face is striking, black face with shiny markers and Bulova logo.  It is easy to set and has kept time perfectly.  It has a nice big rear window for watching the action.  The strap was a good size, my wrist is fairly small and I'm in the middle hole, so lots of room on either side.  I own several similar watches, but the Bulova is getting the most wear.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is quality-and performance-oriented, focusing on durability, fit, and depth of experience across a wide range of products. They write balanced, detail-rich reviews that emphasize practical information—like component failures, sizing accuracy, and gameplay variety—to guide others toward reliable purchases and to warn about shortcomings. Their motivation is consumer advocacy: sharing firsthand observations so buyers can set realistic expectations and avoid disappointment.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an enthusiastic, experienced gamer who values depth, strategic complexity, and player agency; they focus on how varied mechanics, challenge, and replayability create long-lasting enjoyment. Their reviews take an energetic, persuasive tone, highlighting specific gameplay features and aesthetic strengths to help fellow gamers with similar tastes quickly gauge if a title will satisfy their desire for rich, choice-driven experiences.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
I really like these shoes and they look sharp, but they do run a bit bigger than expected beware.
Of all the house shoes i've gotten in the last 5 years, these are my favorites so far!
no issues, works as expected and looks good!

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical functionality and accurate product depiction, offering detailed, context-rich feedback that highlights specific features, fit, and real-world use cases. Their reviews often mention family needs, versatility, and how closely the item matches online descriptions or images, indicating a desire to help others gauge suitability before purchase. Overall, they write thorough, experience-based endorsements to guide shoppers toward reliable, everyday solutions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a practical, family-oriented user whose feedback centers on how well products safeguard and enhance their child’s gaming experience. They emphasize functional quality, completeness of included accessories, and seamless gameplay integration, aiming to guide other parents toward reliable, user-friendly purchases.

user_history_reviews.review_text: This is just what it says- a lightweight cardigan-style piece that could be worn over a tank top, t-shirt, or even over a swim suit.  I plan to wear mine over tank tops and knit tops with pants to work and casually.  It's soft, thin, and see-through.  The color looks like what we used to describe as "dusty rose", which is pretty much how it looked on my phone screen.  I think this will be a fun piece to wear once Ohio's weather finally warms up!

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical functionality and user experience, offering detailed, hands-on evaluations that highlight learning curves, ergonomics, and real-world usage tips. They value thorough testing and accountability from manufacturers, updating reviews when new information emerges, and aim to guide other shoppers with actionable advice to maximize product performance and avoid pitfalls.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user writes concise, experience-based reviews that focus on immediate gameplay impressions, highlighting sensory quality (graphics) and practical usability factors (keyboard controls). Their motivation appears to be helping other players set expectations—especially regarding difficulty and intensity—by offering balanced praise and caution early in their playthroughs, rather than providing exhaustive technical detail.

user_history_reviews.review_text: OK so this mouse does have a learning curve. It took a few weeks of using it to get really comfortable. Your hand is not use to being in this position so give it some time. You also have to learn not to push forward while clicking the mouse as this will cause just enough movement for it not to click where you want it to. Had to hold steady over links for the first little while. After you do get used to it all seems natural. No wrist pain, No fatigue, Just comfortable gaming and browsing. If you do get this really you need to give it time. Buy it while Amazon offers a longer return time so you can really check it out.
I like this very customizable. Feels good in your hand. Very responsive. All around great mouse.

The mouse does function very well. The only thing is the description says every button is programmable through software but no software to program buttons is provided just the driver. So far no good answer from maker.
UPDATE::: OK really didn't get an answer from maker but was told by another user that the software download on the makers website does now contain the correct software. I did verify that this was true. ( I got it from another user who said he got it from website.) I wish you could turn off the lights or make them one color.
SO:: I really like this mouse now that it has been resolved. Still not going to give 5 stars because of the customer service side not so good.

This is a very nice belt. Love the ratchet so I can adjust as needed. Just be careful to cut smaller amounts when adjusting length. If i had cut mine at the 33 mark it would have been too short. Take your time cut a little then put it on cut more if needed.

If you're getting this get the belt clip for it. It does what it says but is too long, Hard and uncomfortable sitting in your pocket. It is really not that easy to get out a single key with one hand unless you loosen the post but then the keys just spin around and defeats the purpose. Returned it.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented tech and lifestyle enthusiast who balances loyal brand interest with pragmatic scrutiny of comfort, performance, pricing, and warranty support. They write thorough, scenario-based reviews that weigh pros and cons and include practical tips or cautions, aiming to help fellow consumers make informed, value-conscious decisions. Their motivation is to share experiential expertise while holding manufacturers accountable for quality and customer service.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an experienced, brand-aware gamer who writes detailed, feature-focused reviews to guide fellow players toward smart hardware choices. Their evaluations center on ergonomics, technical specifications, cross-platform compatibility, and real-world value, balancing loyalty to innovative brands with a critical eye on comfort, warranty support, and price-to-performance ratios.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
These boots are fun and trendy. They actually fit pretty true to size although they do get a little tight in the toe box due to the pointy nature of the boots themselves.

Comfort level is pretty high and while they certainly aren’t tennis shoes, I had no issues wearing them out several nights on the town.

No complaints here.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by practical functionality, reliability, and usability, often assessing products against past experience and real-world constraints like backward compatibility or ease of learning. Their context-rich reviews weave in personal situations—writing a novel, caring for a sick parent, misplacing equipment—to illustrate how well a product solves tangible problems, provides emotional relief, or meets aesthetic preferences. Overall, they aim to guide others toward dependable, user-friendly solutions by candidly balancing praise and criticism.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is driven by a blend of aesthetic appeal and everyday functionality, highlighting how cute design elements and reliable performance enhance their gaming setup. Their feedback is concise, enthusiastic, and balanced, combining positive emotional reactions with practical notes on durability or minor flaws to help fellow casual gamers make pleasant, worry-free purchases. Overall, they aim to share delight while offering a fair heads-up about potential issues.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Peachtree was the first accounting software that I ever learned to use and it was the one I liked the best, over the years. I have tried many others including Quickbooks in its various iterations and I always came back to my old Peachtree. Unfortunately it's no longer an option and I had to try this, and it was extremely disappointing to say the least.

I loved Peachtree, but now it has been renamed and redesigned and is not backwards compatible.  So maybe if you simply want to move forward, this will work for you, but if you have any prior year records that you want to move into new software, this will not work for you.

I have never used a voice-recording-transcription software before so I love this. It's not 100% accurate but pretty close - but I dont have a heavy accent of any kind so that might help.  Im writing a novel and sometimes I am thinking faster than I can type, and I tend to lose track of what I might be trying to say - not any longer! Now I can just talk, my words immediately flowing onto the page (so to speak) and I can get down all of my thoughts without losing anything! Love it!

Quickbooks is the standard for small business accounting but definitely not the easiest or the cheapest to use.  If you're new to it, it can take a very long time to understand what you are supposed to do. Tech support is not very nice or helpful.

This app helped me sleep during a very tough time, when I was spending nights at the hospital with my very sick mother. All the lights and beeps and sounds, plus constant interruptions from nursing staff, made it super hard to sleep, until I put earbuds in and cranked this app. With a towel over my eyes, I set the app for 6 hours and actually slept for most of that time. Probably had it cranked far louder than was good for my ears, but, it did the trick and let me sleep enough to allow me to function. It was frankly a life-saver.

I accidentally left my work-mouse at my other home after an extended visit and needed a new mouse in a hurry. I have a Macbook with a hub and I just don't like the wireless ones, so I got this hoping it would do the trick. It's perfect. I don't use all the fancy features, just needed a mouse that works well and reliably, and that's what I got with this one. Plus it's pink which I like better than plain old black.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical functionality and accurate product representation. They write concise, straightforward reviews that highlight performance improvements, fit, and reliability, often including actionable tips (e.g., sizing guidance) to help others set realistic expectations. Their primary purpose is to confirm that the item works as advertised and to reassure fellow buyers through brief but informative endorsements.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is motivated by fairness and transactional accuracy, focusing their evaluations on whether the item arrives as described and the seller meets expectations, regardless of personal enjoyment of the game itself. Their reviews are concise and pragmatic, aiming to help others judge seller reliability and product condition rather than the content’s entertainment value.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
Works great. Looks cool.
After years struggling with low power rechargeable batteries the upgrade has been amazing. I can play for almost a week before recharging.
Shoes run slightly small,  order a half size to fill size up just depends on your sock thickness
Great boot. Fits perfect,  exactly as pictured

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical performance and reliability in high-stress, professional situations. They write detailed, scenario-based critiques to spotlight functional shortcomings that could impact safety or efficiency, aiming to inform like-minded users and push manufacturers toward improvements.

user_history_reviews.review_text: Awesome game

The boot itself is great but the laces it comes with are way to short. If I tie them tightly like I would normally tie my old boots I could unzip them and get them on and off with minimal effort. With these it is almost impossible to get them on.  If I loosen the laces up so I can put them on normally with not much effort, the laces are barely long enough to tie and can not be double-knotted, so they constantly come untied.  These are Tactical boots, why would I ever want laces so short they can't be double-knotted so I don't have to worry about them falling off when I'm chasing someone.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is practicality-driven and motivated by how well a product’s real-world performance aligns with its advertised specs, especially in terms of fit, ergonomics, and plug-and-play compatibility. They write thorough, experience-based reviews—peppered with humor but grounded in detailed observations—to give fellow consumers clear expectations and to reward or call out manufacturers for accuracy and durability. Fairness matters to them, so they separate personal taste from objective quality, aiming to guide others who share their need for reliable, correctly sized or fully functional gear.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is an enthusiastic yet practical gamer who evaluates products through the lens of comfort, cross-platform compatibility, and durability, openly acknowledging personal preferences such as controller ergonomics. Their reviews strive to be fair and helpful, deliberately separating subjective taste from objective build quality while emphasizing whether a game or accessory delivers reliable, engaging fun. Overall, they write concise but experience-rich impressions meant to guide fellow gamers toward dependable, enjoyable choices.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
I didn't want to jump through hoops to get my PS4 controller to work with Windows 10. I saw this and their XBOX style controller. I decided to give them a try, so got one of each style. Tried the XBOX version for awhile. Worked great, recognized immediately. I just hate the XBOX controller style. Lol.

Finally tried this one. It's close enough to the PS4 feel, that I'm happy! It was also recognized immediately, and sometimes can be passed off as an XBOX controller, depending on what game you're playing, or it will be recognized as a generic gamepad as well. Heaven forbid! Microsoft recognizes a Sony PlayStation style controller! Lol. So it's called generic gamepad. The buttons are labelled as an XBOX controller as well so there's no wondering when using it for Win 10.

So far it's been sturdy. Played a few different style games on STEAM with it and no problems being recognized, or with sensitivity, or with stuttering.

It doesn't have the "smoothness" that I feel with a PS4 controller, but it's close enough that it goes unnoticed after playing awhile. I always preferred corded controllers as well. The cords on these are really long so you can get a good distance of that's your thing.c

Overall I'm very happy with these. So far they've been sturdy as well.

I wear a 3XL US size because I like my clothes a little on the baggy side.  The 3XL on this however seemed like it was just an XL not even a 2X.  It fit, but it was very clingy and probably only fit because the way it's made makes it very stretchy.  I got this for a display I'm working on, but would have liked to be able to wear it if I so wanted to later.  It is actually very nicely made so I'm bummed out that it doesn't fit right.  If it fit as it should it would be a 5 star product.  I will say that if you're buffed out and chiseled up then you probably won't mind about the clinginess and would probably like this.

Holy smackers is this thing measured WAY wrong at least for US sizes.  I wear a 3XL these days so I ordered a 3XL.  The 3XL felt like a MEDium size it was so tight and clinging to me like shrink wrap.  This thing is useless waste of money to me.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is strongly motivated by specific functionality and performance; they evaluate products based on whether promised technical features actually work and enhance their entertainment experience. Their reviews balance enthusiastic praise when needs are met with candid criticism when advertised integrations fail, aiming to guide like-minded users toward reliable, feature-rich options. Overall, they write to help others reclaim or improve enjoyable activities through trustworthy technology.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is driven by excitement and novelty in gameplay, quickly praising unique features that enhance their personal enjoyment (e.g., the rare ability to fly a Peter Pan galleon that also fires missiles). Their reviews are brief, upbeat endorsements aimed more at sharing enthusiasm than providing exhaustive analysis, suggesting a value system centered on fun and imaginative experiences rather than technical scrutiny or cost considerations.

user_history_reviews.review_text: I bought this app as a replacement for PFolio.  Pfolio no longer had the functionality it once had because Google no longer supported auto downloads which made viewing slideshows impossible.  I tried the one for OneDrive, but I wasn't happy with it either.  Then I tried this app and it had everything I wanted.  I can finally view my vacation pics as a slideshow again!  I would highly recommend this app.
Fun game.  However, this game does not interact with Amazon GameCircle like it says it does.  I have not been able to get AGC to work with this game.  :(
This is a fun game.  Touchscreen is a bit touchy at times, but most of the time it's okay.  Highly recommended for &#34;Saga&#34; fans.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by real-world usability and expectation accuracy, comparing products against marketed images or alternative versions to judge how well they deliver practical enjoyment. They write casual yet descriptive reviews that spotlight convenience, experiential fun, and fit/quality discrepancies, aiming to help others anticipate true performance and avoid disappointment. Their feedback balances enthusiastic praise for items that enhance everyday enjoyment with candid criticism when products fall short of promised standards.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is primarily motivated by personal enjoyment and the convenience of portable gaming, emphasizing how interactive features, humor, and on-the-go play enhance their experience. Their reviews are enthusiastic and experience-focused rather than technical, aiming to share excitement and steer like-minded gamers toward titles that deliver fun, strong graphics, and accessibility. Overall, they write to celebrate games that fit an active lifestyle while offering entertaining stories and solid mechanics.

user_history_reviews.review_text: It’s.. okay? It reminds me of a work shirt you’d wear at a sporting goods store. The sleeves are way shorter than the picture and not much armpit room. Disappointed with my purchase but that’s the risk you take with Amazon clothing.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by functional reliability under specific, high-demand scenarios and writes detail-rich reviews that evaluate how products perform when pushed to their limits. They anchor their feedback in personal context (competitive gaming intensity, plus-size professional attire) and highlight practical shortcomings or advantages to guide others with similar niche needs. Their writing signals a desire to empower like-minded consumers through precise, scenario-based insights rather than general impressions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a competitive, performance-driven gamer who evaluates products by how reliably they function during high-intensity, split-second scenarios. They prioritize precision and durability over casual convenience, and write critical, scenario-based reviews to warn fellow serious players when gear fails to maintain a competitive edge.

user_history_reviews.review_text: I am a big fan of these tights. They're definitely tights quality, but the level of opacity on them is low enough that they honestly read almost more like black pantyhose. It's a great look, especially for business looks where opaque tights might seem too casual. And, no sudden runs before lunchtime! My only real wish is that they had more colors. For we plus-size women, it's so darn hard to find a selection beyond "black", "off-black", and "super-opaque black".

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by functional reliability and proper fit; they scrutinize whether products or apps actually work for their intended audience and current conditions. They gather concrete evidence (e.g., testing on multiple body types, noting OS compatibility) and present balanced yet cautions reviews to protect other consumers from wasting money or encountering usability problems. Their writing reflects a conscientious, community-minded approach that values accuracy, detailed situational context, and fairness.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user appears to be a brand-loyal collector who values craftsmanship and fine visual detail, especially in established collectible lines. Their reviews are concise, repetitive affirmations that express enthusiasm and personal delight rather than analytical critique, suggesting they write mainly to celebrate consistent quality and share their fandom with like-minded buyers.

user_history_reviews.review_text: This app has not been updated on since last century. The developer is updating the app on the Google Play Store only; he totally forgot about us, paid customers from the Amazon App Store. Do not download/purchase the app from here, because it does not work on the latest Android OS versions.

El producto se ve de buena calidad, pero las proporciones del mismo son terribles. Este producto es para personas altas y esbeltas. Si eres esbelto, pero bajito, la parte de arriba te quedará bien, pero no la de abajo. Y si de piernas y glúteos no eres esbelto, te va quedar enorme el producto. Este producto lo probaron 5 personas, con diferentes tipos de cuerpo, y de ahí comparto la experiencia. No lo recomiendo a menos que midas 6 pies de altura o más y seas esbelto de upper y lower body.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is driven by practical functionality and real-world usability, methodically testing items and noting how they perform in everyday scenarios. They craft balanced, detail-oriented reviews that weigh pros and cons—highlighting fit, comfort, technical performance, and durability—to equip other shoppers with clear, actionable insights. Their emphasis on family-friendly value and reliability reveals a conscientious user motivated by helping others make informed, confidence-building purchase decisions.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is quality-oriented and strongly focused on practical playability; they judge games by coherent structure, intuitive controls, and technical stability. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to warn others about frustrating flaws and to set expectations about usability rather than graphics or storyline depth. They adopt a critical tone aimed at safeguarding fellow players from wasted time and annoyance.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
This is a very nice pair of headset. It can be used for more than just gaming. It is really big but there's a nice elastic band so it will fit most heads. It has a retractable microphone that you can use. You have to make sure it has to positioned correctly or people will not be able to hear you properly. I actually used this to take some calls for work, as well as used this for recording. I did notice the microphone picked up quite a bit. I accidentally banged my knee against a table and you can hear a clear thud in the recording I was trying to create. However, the microphone is also very clear. My voice came across in great quality.

Now on to the sound of the headphones. The sound comes through nicely. It boasts about the surround sound, which on my phone, didn't seem to come across as surround sound. It was just a few levels above my apple headphones.

Overall, I am pleased with this headset though. While sound could be better, I really like the way the sound comes through on the microphone. It picks up the voice well - the voice is not fuzzy or anything. It just also picks up other external noise as well.

I really liked how the dress looked on the model so decided to try it out. The color matches the picture and the fit is as expected. I normally wear a medium and got a medium and it fit fine. I do like how the shape does help to hide my mom pouch. I felt pretty comfortable in it - although the material is a bit thin. It will be great for summer but it also makes me wonder how well it'll hold up after many wears. It will definitely be used a bit more in the summer months.

These are a cute pair of slippers and so fuzzy and warm. Initially when I put my feet in there, I thought it was too small but it does expand a bit to adjust to your feet. The support is nice but I will say that if you have wide feet, the support may not feel like it is all there. The support in the center doesn't quite expand the whole portion of the slipper so it feels slightly off with wide feet. That said, these are still really nice.

This is a great sweater perfect for the ugly sweater contests. However, I wouldn't call this one ugly! I got it for my husband and it's super cute and seem to be quite thick. The scarf on the reindeer that hangs give it a little bit of extra touch. It comes with batteries so you can install it and light yourself up. Enjoy!

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is mechanically minded and highly focused on functional quality, reliability, and ergonomic fit rather than brand prestige or low price alone. They write thorough, diagnostic reviews that document technical shortcomings and compare competing products, aiming to warn others about usability frustrations and to push manufacturers toward sturdier, better-designed solutions. Their motivation is pragmatic problem-solving and helping fellow consumers avoid wasted time or money on gear that fails to perform.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is driven by practical functionality and reliability, offering detailed, first-hand accounts of setup, compatibility, and performance issues to warn others about potential frustrations. They value straightforward operation over brand reputation or aesthetics, and their critiques aim to steer fellow consumers toward equipment that works seamlessly without excessive troubleshooting.

user_history_reviews.review_text:
I notice the only reviewer pictures all have this set up backwards. The vertical tube between the gamer and the pedals. Turn it around and there is a clear shot to the brake pedal!
Maybe it holds up better that way for those reviewers. This uses quick releases like you would find holding a bicycle seat. But they do not hold tight like a bicycle seat. I think the problem is in the light weight tubing and/or the size of the tubes. The outer tube is a much larger size than the inner tube. So there is a plastic spacer. But this plastic spacer allows the parts to move around too easily. I got so annoyed with it not holding that I just put it up.
It might be getting some holes drilled and quick release pins for a semi permanent setting.
Fits the PSP 1001 and 3001 charge ports a bit tight. This is my second cable but the first one that needs a bit of effort to insert. But it is not the only adapter i have that is a snug fit.

When comparing these Rustlers "From the makers of Wrangler" to actual Wrangler Relaxed fit of the same size, the Rustlers feel very snug and like a regular or slim fit.
The price was great. But if I cant get used to the tighter fit, I will just donate them to a shelter or some place. Rustler is certainly not going to replace the Wranglers that I have been accustomed to.

AEAU46Z6SC3RRNCHFIB5RKUUGROQ.product_description: Write your own epic odyssey and become a legendary Spartan hero. Forge your destiny in a world on the brink of tearing itself apart. Influence how history unfolds in an ever-changing world shaped by your choices.
AEAU46Z6SC3RRNCHFIB5RKUUGROQ.review_text: I've played a couple of Assassin's Creeds before, and they never really grabbed my attention.  I find I do really enjoy this one however.  Some of the game dynamics though seem to have been sacrificed.  For example, I thought in older versions you could pull someone off a cliff, but you can't in this one.  There don't seem to be any attacks made if you are at a lower position than your target.  What I like most though are the naval battles.  The controls are very well done, and I find myself sailing around sinking everything I can find.  My only problem with that is that the game doesn't seem to save as often when sailing, so you have to remember to do that more often.  So far I'm really enjoying the game, I'm at level 27 so far and it feels like I've barely scratched the surface of the game.

AH5FRWVSGVAZAP46QTVVG6RPEIJA.product_description: Three territories. Three houses. Your very own journey.War is coming to the continent of Fódlan. Here, order is maintained by the Church of Seiros, which hosts the prestigious Officer’s Academy within its headquarters. You are invited to teach one of its three mighty houses, each comprised of students brimming with personality and represented by a royal from one of three territories. As their professor, you must lead your students in their academic lives and in turn-based, tactical RPG battles wrought with strategic, new twists to overcome. Which house, and which path, will you choose?Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online play. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply.2019 Nintendo / INTELLIGENT SYSTEMS. Co-developed by KOEI TECMO GAMES CO., LTD. Fire Emblem and Nintendo Switch are trademarks of Nintendo. © 2019 Nintendo.x.
AH5FRWVSGVAZAP46QTVVG6RPEIJA.review_text: Do you like RPG's / Strategic games / Choices matter? This game has it all in spades.. great artwork and good combat and effects.. Plus it essentially has 3 modes.. Tactics/Battle/Simulation- Conversation building.

AH5FRWVSGVAZAP46QTVVG6RPEIJA.product_description: CARTRIDGE ONLY. cartridge is in good shape as in it does not have any cracks or physical flaws. Label is fully intact. cartridge does have typical signs of wear as in scratches, smudges, and dust or dirt in creases. All games are tested before being placed into our inventory.

Castlevania was a cakewalk compared to this bloody curse. You thought you had the Prince of Darkness defanged - eh, Simon Belmont? Well think again, 'cause according to a damsel in distress, evil Count Dracula has left a horrifying curse in his wake. And the only hope you have of ending the terror is to destroy his missing body parts! Talk about your frightening quest, searching a maze of mansions, graveyards and dark, eerie forests - each guarded by man-eating werewolves, fire-throwing zombies and other devilish demons. Your grim chances are kept alive in Transylvania, where cowardly villagers offer clues to the whereabouts of Dracula's remains. And where you'll purchase magic weapons, including silver knives and flame whips. But beware the night. For when the sun disappears, Dracula's curse grows deadlier. And your chances grow dimmer and dimmer.

From the Manufacturer A dark shadow is spreading over the N64. Count Dracula has once again weakened the seals of his tomb, and the Belmont family is getting anxious. In the latest crusade against the forces of evil, players can choose between two brave vampire-slaying characters. Young Reinhardt Schneider, like his predecessors in the celebrated vampire-hunting Belmont family, will rely primarily on his whip. The other character is Carrie Fernandez, a young woman skilled in the ways of magic and spell-casting. Both are on the hunt for the dreaded Dracula and his devoted legions of vampires. You play a game all the way through with the character you've chosen, concluding with his or her own ending. Each character has an individual route to travel, and to see all of the areas you will have to complete the game using both characters. The passage of time and, especially, the fall of night, play a prominent role in the game. Players will have to search castles filled with dark corners, winding staircases, and other gloomy places. Daytime is the right time for exploring, but be on the lookout for vampires lurking in the shadows. Once the sun goes down, though, you should exercise extreme caution. When night falls, more creatures come out to play, and they become more aggressive as well. Some tasks are impossible to perform unless it is the correct time of day. A clock will allow players to calculate the time and plan their explorations accordingly. Konami has planted many cinematic sequences throughout the game. These scenes are surprisingly creepy, and may make you decide not to pick up your controller at night. Enemy characters are designed to terrify, ranging from the traditional horde of skeletons to half-woman, half-spider mutants. There are some gruesome bosses lurking in the darkness, as well. You will have to defeat Dracula in three different time periods, but don't expect the passage of time to improve his disposition. Reinhardt and Carrie will both have analog control, with different animation sequences for walking, jogging, and running. Reinhardt's whip works on a targeting system. When gruesome enemies are threatening, a green crosshair appears on the screen. If an enemy crawls, slithers, or slides within range of the whip, the target lets you know by turning red. The target automatically hovers over nearby enemies, so once it turns red you are guaranteed of a successful strike. Castlevania has 28 different areas to explore and four different special items at your disposal to fight the forces of evil. An eerie soundtrack tops off the package, creating a satisfying game that takes you on a unique adventure through spooky surroundings.

AG62KZEH6M2D76RNTOW5WAPSBFTQ.product_description: rapell Glass Screen Protectors Compatible with Nintendo Switch OLED - Premium Tempered Glass Screen Protector Twin Pack [2X Screen Guards - 0.33mm] for 6.2 Inch Tablet Screen on Switch OLED Console
AG62KZEH6M2D76RNTOW5WAPSBFTQ.review_text: My son applied this screen protector to his Switch right after receiving it, and he is very happy with it.  It's a thick layer of protection but does not interfere with gameplay at all.  He was happy at how much of the screen is covered-- all but a very tiny sliver at the top-- as opposed to some screen protectors that leave a large margin.  It came with everything needed to apply it and eliminate dust.

AHBRDEXVOGOYCB7GJ2L2JY3YFDNA.product_description: Battlefield 4 is the genre-defining action blockbuster made from moments that blur the line between game and glory. Fueled by the next-generation power and fidelity of Frostbite 3, Battlefield 4 provides a visceral, dramatic experience unlike any other. Only in Battlefield can you demolish the buildings shielding your enemy. Only in Battlefield will you lead an assault from the back of a gun boat. Battlefield grants you the freedom to do more and be more while playing to your strengths and carving your own path to victory. In addition to its hallmark multiplayer, Battlefield 4 features an intense, dramatic character-driven campaign that starts with the evacuation of American VIPs from Shanghai and follows your squad's struggle to find its way home. There is no comparison. Immerse yourself in the glorious chaos of all-out war, found only in Battlefield.

AEE7UPNVWXQVZHSBT6EI43VIWHKQ.product_description: Conquer on console and beyond with the Razer Kaira X—a wired Xbox Series X|S headset designed for maximum audio performance and cross-platform compatibility. Armed with cutting-edge drivers and a crystal-clear mic, enjoy competition-ready audio no matter where you game.
AEE7UPNVWXQVZHSBT6EI43VIWHKQ.review_text:
I’ve been a huge Razer fan since the early days of that company. I found them to be a disruptor in the gaming peripheral market so it’s great to see them continuing to expand their lineup.

I’ve been using a Razer Kraken headset for sometime so it was interesting to switch it up and try their Kaira X line.

First impressions out of the box were that these were substantially lighter than my Krakens, but the crisp white color made them seem really modern and the lines were a lot sleeker.

In terms of fit, I usually game for two or three hours at a time on Call of Duty so having a comfortable headset is probably the most important for me. The Kraken enjoys a full wrap across the entire headband while the Kaira only has the top portion of the band being padded. I would tell you this was a noticeable difference for me in terms of comfort. I found the hard plastic did rub a little bit over time and I certainly prefer the full wrap padding of the more expensive headsets.

Sound quality was great with the 50mm drivers however it is not capable of 7.1 sound like the other headphones in similar price.

Of note, if you have a Xbox AND a PC and want to use these on your PC, you’ll need an audio splitter for the 3.5mm connection to get the mic and speakers working on the same connection. Speaking of the microphone it is not removable and fixed to the left side.

All in all these are probably best suited for a mid to lower end headset for Xbox users. I would think most gamers out there would want to spend just a little more for a higher quality product with more features.

I will caution folks on the Razer warranty. I had one of their gaming mouse (mice) go out on me and after more than 8 emails back and forth, because they determined that the mouse was a week out of warranty they wouldn’t replace it or repair it. This was a frustrating experience because it was a $100 mouse that they wouldn’t even consider fixing the button on.

AE7RCCCPIKCDHFLUIXVBGZLTX7JA.product_description: The boot worn by the world’s leading public safety personnel in a 8” height, the 5.11 A.T.A.C. 2.0. It’s lighter and more comfortable, yet maintains its reputation for toughness and durability. A new air flow tongue and full-length dual durometer Ortholite footbed work to keep your feet cool, dry and comfortable all day, every day. Another new feature, the Achilles heel flex zone, gives a critical part of your foot more range of motion without compromising support. The full-grain suede toe, 840D nylon upper and Shock Mitigation System provide the kind of rugged protection you need; while the knife pocket keeps an important ally within reach.
AE7RCCCPIKCDHFLUIXVBGZLTX7JA.review_text: The boot itself is great but the laces it comes with are way to short. If I tie them tightly like I would normally tie my old boots I could unzip them and get them on and off with minimal effort. With these it is almost impossible to get them on.  If I loosen the laces up so I can put them on normally with not much effort, the laces are barely long enough to tie and can not be double-knotted, so they constantly come untied.  These are Tactical boots, why would I ever want laces so short they can't be double-knotted so I don't have to worry about them falling off when I'm chasing someone.

AHBO2I6DC24SBCUM2ADVWAVHT4CQ.product_description: Product Description The Sims Medieval Pirates & Nobles Adventure Pack introduces new quests, treasure hunting, and hundreds of new objects for your medieval kingdom! Your epic story starts when the Pirates of Aarbyville and the Nobles of Tredony arrive in your kingdom, followed quickly by sword fights, love affairs, grand adventures and mysteries. Go treasure hunting to uncover hidden objects. Embark on new quests to help your kingdom achieve a new ambition. Stylize your kingdom and Sims with new pirate and nobility themed objects and wardrobe. The fun never ends with this new adventure pack! Amazon.com The Sims Medieval: Pirates & Nobles is the first Adventure Pack for the The Sims Medieval *. Dramatically expanding the replay value of the original game, the Pirates & Nobles Adventure Pack contains a wealth of enhancements including: a new Kingdom Ambition, new quests linked to the epic storyline, new signature objects, new traits, more than 140 pirate and nobility themed objects, and the ability to hunt for treasure. Experience the Epic Adventure of Pirates & Nobles The Sims Medieval: Pirates & Nobles Adventure Pack gives players the sandbox style freedom to play as they want, without neglecting guided gameplay in which they will find new quests and one new Kingdom Ambition. Expand gameplay possibilities with the first Adventure Pack for the The Sims Medieval. View larger.    Experience all the rewards and dangers of treasure hunting. View larger. For those who enjoy the rush of heroic missions, new exhilarating quests expand upon the original adventures like finding the fountain of youth or protecting the kingdom from an evil sorcerer. The war between Tredony and Aarbyville creates the new Kingdom Ambition and opportunity for players to suit up their kingdoms. Players can choose to be anyone from a king or queen to a knight or blacksmith, and with that, prepare for voyage accordingly. Treasure hunting is an exciting new gameplay feature in the pack with maps, shovels, rare treasures and surprising dangers, while challenging players to find hidden objects and search for desirable rewards that will benefit their hero Sims. Other new items include birds that you can name and train, and interrogation chairs. AHBO2I6DC24SBCUM2ADVWAVHT4CQ.review_text: Nice add-on for an already addicting game.  Didn't like Sims Medieval as much as regular Sims, but still had fun with it.

AHBO2I6DC24SBCUM2ADVWAVHT4CQ.product_description: IFYOO XONE Wired PC Controller USB Gaming Gamepad Joystick For Computer & Laptop (Windows 10/8/7/XP, Steam) | Android | PS3 | Switch - [3.2M Detachable USB Cable]
AHBO2I6DC24SBCUM2ADVWAVHT4CQ.review_text:
I'm a PS4 gamer, but got a new PC and started collecting games on there. I was going to get an XBOX controller to use on PC, because Microsoft, but saw this and decided to try it. I prefer corder controllers anyway.

It was immediately recognized by Windows 10 as an XBOX controller and fully programmable and useable in all the games I have that allow controller use on PC. So far it's been sturdy, but I found out one thing...

I hate XBOX controller design. Lol. So I searched, and behold! This company makes a PS4 style version as well. It's awesome. I've been using that one for awhile now and it's still going strong. As with all controllers with time, and wear and tear, these will last if you take care of them. They feel flimsy, compared to a pro XBOX controller or pro PS4 controller, but they're not. These are sturdy. Unless I just got lucky.

I'm not knocking my review down, just because I hate the XBOX controller design. I used these for awhile before I got the PS version, and these handled great.

I'm happy I got these. Even if they're for backup now.

It had more interactive things to do, and a great hilarious story! and it being handheld where I can play a side scroller anywhere anytime with great graphics and machanics is an A in my book!

AE2HHCZARXNN3PDMFANR7XK23LIA.product_description: Product Description Amazon Basics PlayStation 4 Controller Thumb Grips From the Manufacturer Amazon Basics
AE2HHCZARXNN3PDMFANR7XK23LIA.review_text: I am not a fan of these. They simply have trouble staying on the sticks. They’re fine under normal play conditions, but in those intense moments where you’re in the middle of a 6v6 and you see their Reaper out of the corner of your eye and you want to whip around quick and shield bash before he gets off the Death Blossom, these have an annoying tendency to pop off. That honestly makes them useless for me, since intense shooters and such are exactly why I want extended sticks in the first place.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AED4A5D3XDKTGB566GFP7YQLSHBQ.product_description: Experience the thrilling adventures of the Parr family as they conquer crime and family life through both Disney Pixar films the Incredibles and the Incredibles 2, in a LEGO world full of fun and humor. LEGO the Incredibles allows players to explore action packed story levels and an epic hub world, including Municiberg and New Urbem, as they use their unique “Super” abilities to bring the city's super villains to justice. Gamers can also team up with family and friends in 2 player Co op to assemble incredible LEGO builds. This title has been rated everyone 10 plus cartoon violence, crude humor.
AED4A5D3XDKTGB566GFP7YQLSHBQ.review_text: The game is all right. It starts off with second movie before going to the first one so the chapters make no sense. some of the controls are confusing and takes multiple tries to do what needs to be done. But the worst part is it keeps crashing. So it’s frustrating trying to play the game.

AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.product_description: THRUSTMASTER T80 Ferrari with NRL Wheel Stand Lite Bundle
AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.review_text:
Not into racing games too much. Maybe because using a game pad is not driving and the wheels I have used have not been too great.

I first tried a wireless of a brand which I have used wired in the past. The wireless worked when it wanted. And that was not too often. I did not want another wired from that same brand, so I bought Thrustmaster.
Much better than the HORIble brand that I have previously used. I may start to like racing games.... If I can ever find a decent stand.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.product_description: HORI brings the best in build-quality, customization options, and authentic racing simulation with the Racing Wheel APEX. HORI's Tokyo design team has brought all the features and quality of a full-size racing wheel at an aggressive price. Massive 270 degree turn-ratio - Completely programmable & adjustable - Vibration feedback - PS4, PS3 & PC compatible. The Racing Wheel APEX clamps securely to your table or racing wheel stand with sturdy clamps and steel parts. The full size pedals are built to last. Change from 270 degree to 180 degree turn ratio on the fly and fine tune other settings such as dead zone, pedal sensitivity and more. Get in the race with the all new RWA: Racing Wheel APEX for PlayStation 4, PlayStation 3 and PC. Officially licensed by Sony. Please download the latest firmware update for additional compatibility on select PlayStation 5 titles. Check compatibility list for supported titles
AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.review_text:
I use a wired Hori on PS3 but I wanted a little freedom this time on the PS4.
This looked like and felt like it was going to be a real nice wheel to own. Was easy to get discovered by the PS4 and add it to the list of controllers.
I inserted Gran Turismo Sport disc for the first time after owning it for two years. So the game loaded on its own and there was no need to use any buttons on the wheel. Once it loaded the wheel did not seem to be doing anything. Was not sure I was hitting the correct buttons on the wheel. Eventually I was able to start a race. Actions in the game did not match my actions at the wheel. I gave up.
Next day I gave it another try. The wheel turned on the PS4 from being powered off. But then no other actions. Turned on a dual shock, turned off the dual shock on the console and turned on the RWA, Scrolled across the XMB for 1-2 seconds and stopped.
NO buttons or actions with the wheel could get any results out of the console. Could not turn up anything in a web search as to why the wireless wheel acted this way.
But I don't mind giving it a one star because though it was unusable, the wheel looked nice.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.product_description: A 2X conductive charger for the Xbox One with an AC Adapter Power Adapter for quick charging. Features blue and Green LED indicators for charge status. Has matte and glossy black and chrome details. This sleek design matches the new console perfectly! Includes 2 1200mAh Energizer Recharge Battery Packs for up to 40 hours of playtime. Conveniently store and secure your Xbox One controllers in the charging system's dual cradles and never waste valuable gaming time again.
AH36SKICKLET4KJI2I42C7IA6DQA.review_text: Purchased the first one of these and it seemed to work well. The charger vanished from here for a while and when it finally came back I bought another. With the second one, the controllers will not seat properly to charge. You have to fiddle with the controller until you see the charge light on the charger come on, then walk away easily and hope it stays connected until fully charged.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity
